# WorkOS OpenAPI specification

This folder is used for a documentation engineering learning experiment.

Source: WorkOS OpenAPI specification  
Repository: https://github.com/workos/openapi-spec  
License: MIT, as stated by the source repository.

This project is independent and is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by WorkOS.

The purpose of using this specification is to study how a real-world OpenAPI contract can support API reference generation, SDK/client generation, documentation automation, and quality checks.
